title: “SOD_compiled_figures” output: html_document date: “2024-06-11” —

Load data from all three experiments

load("Data/ITS/filtered_data/sodexp.RData")
sod_its.ps<-sod.ps

load("Data/ITS/filtered_data/sod_5asv.RData")
sod_5asv_its.ps<-sod_5asv.ps

load("Data/16S/filtered_data/sodexp.RData")
sod_16S.ps<-sod.ps

load("Data/16S/filtered_data/sod_5asv.RData")
sod_5asv_16S.ps<-sod_5asv.ps

load("Data/RPS10/filtered_data/sod_pruned.RData")
sod_rps10.ps<-sod_prunereads.ps

load("Data/RPS10/filtered_data/sod_prunereads_5asv.RData")
sod_5asv_rps10.ps<-sod_prunereads_5asv.ps

Let’s calculate alpha diversity metrics for ITS dataset

set.seed(1)
AD_its <- estimate_richness(sod_its.ps, measures = c("InvSimpson"))
rownames(AD_its) <- gsub("\\.", "-", rownames(AD_its))

# Combine richness estimates with sample metadata
AD_its <- cbind(AD_its, sample_data(sod_its.ps)[row.names(AD_its), c("Treatuntreat_EP", "Fire_Mod", "YrSinceTrt_BR")])


variables <- c("Treatuntreat_EP", "Fire_Mod", "YrSinceTrt_BR")
measures <- c("InvSimpson")

plots_its <- list()

for (variable in variables) {
  p <- phyloseq::plot_richness(sod_its.ps, x = variable, measures = c("InvSimpson")) + 
    geom_boxplot() +
    theme_classic() +  # Use theme_classic() as a starting point
    theme(
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),  # Add border around plot panel
      axis.line = element_blank(),  # Remove axis lines (they'll be replaced by the panel border)
      plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "lines"),  # Add some margin around the plot
      plot.title = element_text(margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Add some space below the title
      axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),  # Add some space above the x-axis title
      axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)), # Add some space to the right of the y-axis title
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1)
    )
  plots_its[[variable]] <- p
}
## Warning: The `size` argument of `element_rect()` is deprecated as of ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use the `linewidth` argument instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
#Let's calculate Tukey results
# Function to perform Tukey HSD and extract letters
get_tukey_letters <- function(data, measure, variable) {
  formula <- as.formula(paste(measure, "~", variable))
  aov_result <- aov(formula, data = data)
  tukey_result <- HSD.test(aov_result, variable, group = TRUE)
  letters <- tukey_result$groups$groups
  return(letters)
}

# Perform Tukey HSD tests and store results
tukey_results_ITS <- list()
for (variable in variables) {
  for (measure in measures) {
    tryCatch({
      letters <- get_tukey_letters(AD_its, measure, variable)
      tukey_results_ITS[[paste(measure, variable, sep = "_")]] <- letters
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("Error in Tukey test for ", measure, " by ", variable, ": ", e$message)
    })
  }
}


print(tukey_results_ITS)
## $InvSimpson_Treatuntreat_EP
## [1] "a" "a"
## 
## $InvSimpson_Fire_Mod
## [1] "a" "a" "a"
## 
## $InvSimpson_YrSinceTrt_BR
## [1] "a" "a" "a" "a" "a"

Let’s calculate alpha diversity metrics for 16S dataset

AD_16S <- estimate_richness(sod_16S.ps, measures = c("InvSimpson"))
rownames(AD_16S) <- gsub("\\.", "-", rownames(AD_16S))

# Combine richness estimates with sample metadata
AD_16S <- cbind(AD_16S, sample_data(sod_16S.ps)[row.names(AD_16S), c("Treatuntreat_EP", "Fire_Mod", "YrSinceTrt_BR")])

order_YrSinceTrt_BR <- sort(unique(AD_16S$YrSinceTrt_BR))

variables <- c("Treatuntreat_EP", "Fire_Mod", "YrSinceTrt_BR")
measures <- c("InvSimpson")
# Create an empty list to store plots
plots_16S <- list()

# Loop through each variable and create the plot
for (variable in variables) {
  p <- phyloseq::plot_richness(sod_16S.ps, x = variable, measures = c("InvSimpson")) + 
    geom_boxplot() +
    theme_classic() +  # Use theme_classic() as a starting point
    theme(
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),  # Add border around plot panel
      axis.line = element_blank(),  # Remove axis lines (they'll be replaced by the panel border)
      plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "lines"),  # Add some margin around the plot
      plot.title = element_text(margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Add some space below the title
      axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),  # Add some space above the x-axis title
      axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1)
    )
  plots_16S[[variable]] <- p
}

#Let's calculate Tukey results
# Function to perform Tukey HSD and extract letters
get_tukey_letters <- function(data, measure, variable) {
  formula <- as.formula(paste(measure, "~", variable))
  aov_result <- aov(formula, data = data)
  tukey_result <- HSD.test(aov_result, variable, group = TRUE)
  letters <- tukey_result$groups$groups
  return(letters)
}

# Perform Tukey HSD tests and store results
tukey_results_16S <- list()
for (variable in variables) {
  for (measure in measures) {
    tryCatch({
      letters <- get_tukey_letters(AD_16S, measure, variable)
      tukey_results_16S[[paste(measure, variable, sep = "_")]] <- letters
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("Error in Tukey test for ", measure, " by ", variable, ": ", e$message)
    })
  }
}


print(tukey_results_16S)
## $InvSimpson_Treatuntreat_EP
## [1] "a" "b"
## 
## $InvSimpson_Fire_Mod
## [1] "a"  "ab" "b" 
## 
## $InvSimpson_YrSinceTrt_BR
## [1] "a"  "a"  "ab" "ab" "b"

Let’s calculate alpha diversity metrics for RPS10 dataset

set.seed(1)

AD_rps10 <- estimate_richness(sod_rps10.ps, measures = c("InvSimpson"))
rownames(AD_rps10) <- gsub("\\.", "-", rownames(AD_rps10))

# Combine richness estimates with sample metadata
AD_rps10 <- cbind(AD_rps10, sample_data(sod_rps10.ps)[row.names(AD_rps10), c("Treatuntreat_EP", "Fire_Mod", "YrSinceTrt_BR" )])


variables <- c("Treatuntreat_EP", "Fire_Mod", "YrSinceTrt_BR")
measures <- c("InvSimpson")

# Create an empty list to store plots
plots_rps10 <- list()

# Loop through each variable and create the plot
for (variable in variables) {
  p <- phyloseq::plot_richness(sod_rps10.ps, x = variable, measures = c("InvSimpson")) + 
    geom_boxplot() +
    theme_classic() +  # Use theme_classic() as a starting point
    theme(
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),  # Add border around plot panel
      axis.line = element_blank(),  # Remove axis lines (they'll be replaced by the panel border)
      plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "lines"),  # Add some margin around the plot
      plot.title = element_text(margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Add some space below the title
      axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),  # Add some space above the x-axis title
      axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),  # Add some space to the right of the y-axis title
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1)
    )
  plots_rps10[[variable]] <- p
}

#Let's calculate Tukey results
# Function to perform Tukey HSD and extract letters
get_tukey_letters <- function(data, measure, variable) {
  formula <- as.formula(paste(measure, "~", variable))
  aov_result <- aov(formula, data = data)
  tukey_result <- HSD.test(aov_result, variable, group = TRUE)
  letters <- tukey_result$groups$groups
  return(letters)
}

# Perform Tukey HSD tests and store results
tukey_results_rps10 <- list()
for (variable in variables) {
  for (measure in measures) {
    tryCatch({
      letters <- get_tukey_letters(AD_rps10, measure, variable)
      tukey_results_rps10[[paste(measure, variable, sep = "_")]] <- letters
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("Error in Tukey test for ", measure, " by ", variable, ": ", e$message)
    })
  }
}


print(tukey_results_rps10)
## $InvSimpson_Treatuntreat_EP
## [1] "a" "a"
## 
## $InvSimpson_Fire_Mod
## [1] "a" "a" "a"
## 
## $InvSimpson_YrSinceTrt_BR
## [1] "a" "a" "a" "a" "a"

Let’s combine the treatment plots

library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)

# Function to modify individual plots
modify_plot <- function(plot, title) {
  plot +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),  # Add border around plot panel
      axis.line = element_blank(),  # Remove axis lines (they'll be replaced by the panel border)
      plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "lines"),  # Add some margin around the plot
      axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),  # Add some space above the x-axis title
      axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),  # Add some space to the right of the y-axis title
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)  # Center the plot title
    ) +
    ylab("Inverse Simpson Index") +
    ggtitle(title)  # Add the factor name as the plot title
}

create_label <- function(text, x = 0.5, y = 0.95) {
  ggdraw() + 
    draw_label(text, fontface = 'bold', x = x, y = y, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 1)
}

label_A <- create_label("A.")
label_B <- create_label("B.")
label_C <- create_label("C.")

# Create row layouts
create_row <- function(plots, label, dataset) {
  modified_plots <- list(
    modify_plot(plots[["Treatuntreat_EP"]], "Untreated vs. Treated Plots"),
    modify_plot(plots[["Fire_Mod"]], "Untreated vs. SOD Treated vs. Wildfire"),
    modify_plot(plots[["YrSinceTrt_BR"]], "Years Since Treatment")
  )
  
  plot_row <- plot_grid(
    modified_plots[[1]],
    modified_plots[[2]],
    modified_plots[[3]],
    ncol = 3,
    align = 'h',
    axis = 'bt'
  )
  plot_grid(label, plot_row, ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(0.05, 1))
}

# Create rows for each dataset
row_16S <- create_row(plots_16S, label_A, "16S")
row_ITS <- create_row(plots_16S, label_B, "ITS")
row_RPS10 <- create_row(plots_16S, label_C, "RPS10")

# Combine all rows
facetted_figure_trt <- plot_grid(
  row_16S,
  row_ITS,
  row_RPS10,
  nrow = 3,
  align = 'v',
  axis = 'l'
)

# Add margins
facetted_figure_trt_with_margins <- plot_grid(
  NULL, facetted_figure_trt, NULL,
  ncol = 3,
  rel_widths = c(0.02, 1, 0.02)  # 2% margin on each side
)

# Display the plot
facetted_figure_trt_with_margins

# Save the figure
ggsave("Figures/SOD/facetted_figure_alphadiv_combined.svg", facetted_figure_trt_with_margins, width = 15, height = 18)
ggsave("Figures/SOD/facetted_figure_alphadiv_combined.pdf", facetted_figure_trt_with_margins, width = 15, height = 18)

Let’s proceed with ordination for the ITS dataset-PCoA

set.seed(1)
strat_rel_sod_its.ps<-transform_sample_counts(sod_5asv_its.ps, function(x) x / sum(x))

ps_PCoA_its = ordinate(strat_rel_sod_its.ps, 
                   method="PCoA", 
                   distance="bray")

plot_its_trt<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_its.ps, 
                         ps_PCoA_its ,
                         color= "Treatuntreat_EP") +
  #ggtitle("PCoA ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "Treatuntreat_EP") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_its_trt<-plot_its_trt +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_its_trt

plot_its_fire<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_its.ps, 
                         ps_PCoA_its ,
                         color= "Fire_Mod") +
  #ggtitle("PCoA ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "Fire_Mod") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_its_fire<-plot_its_fire +
   stat_ellipse(linetype =2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_its_fire

plot_its_yrtrt<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_its.ps, 
                         ps_PCoA_its ,
                         color= "YrSinceTrt_BR") +
  #ggtitle("PCoA ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "YrSinceTrt_BR") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_its_yrtrt<-plot_its_yrtrt +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_its_yrtrt

Let’s proceed with ordination for the 16S dataset-PCoA

set.seed(1)
strat_rel_sod_16S.ps<-transform_sample_counts(sod_5asv_16S.ps, function(x) x / sum(x))


ps_PCoA_16S = ordinate(strat_rel_sod_16S.ps,

                         ps_PCoA_16S ,

   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +

   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

Let’s proceed with ordination for the RPS10 dataset-pCoA

set.seed(1)
strat_rel_sod_rps10.ps<-transform_sample_counts(sod_5asv_rps10.ps, function(x) x / sum(x))

ps_PCoA_rps10 = ordinate(strat_rel_sod_rps10.ps, 
                   method="PCoA", 
                   distance="bray")

plot_rps10_trt<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_rps10.ps, 
                         ps_PCoA_rps10 ,
                         color= "Treatuntreat_EP") +
  #ggtitle("PCoA ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "Treatuntreat_EP") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_rps10_trt<-plot_rps10_trt +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_rps10_trt

plot_rps10_fire<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_rps10.ps, 
                         ps_PCoA_rps10 ,
                         color= "Fire_Mod") +
  #ggtitle("PCoA ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "Fire_Mod") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_rps10_fire<-plot_rps10_fire +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_rps10_fire

plot_rps10_yrtrt<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_rps10.ps, 
                         ps_PCoA_rps10 ,
                         color= "YrSinceTrt_BR") +
  #ggtitle("PCoA ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "YrSinceTrt_BR") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_rps10_yrtrt<-plot_rps10_yrtrt +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_rps10_yrtrt

Let’s combine plots into facetted plot

### Let's combine plots into facetted plot
create_column <- function(ord_plot) {
  plot_grid(
    ord_plot,
    nrow = 1,
    align = 'v',
    axis = 'l',
    rel_heights = c(1)
  )
}

# Create columns for each dataset and factor
col_16S_treatment <- create_column(plot_ellipses_16S_trt)
col_16S_yrtrt <- create_column(plot_ellipses_16S_yrtrt)
col_16S_fire <- create_column(plot_ellipses_16S_fire)
col_its_treatment <- create_column(plot_ellipses_its_trt)
col_its_yrtrt <- create_column(plot_ellipses_its_yrtrt)
col_its_fire <- create_column(plot_ellipses_its_fire)
col_rps10_treatment <- create_column(plot_ellipses_rps10_trt)
col_rps10_yrtrt <- create_column(plot_ellipses_rps10_yrtrt)
col_rps10_fire <- create_column(plot_ellipses_rps10_fire)

# Function to create headers with horizontal lines above
create_header <- function(text) {
  ggplot() +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, color = "black", size = 0.5) +
    geom_text(aes(x = 0.02, y = 0.4, label = text), size = 5, fontface = "bold", hjust = 0) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(5, 0, 0, 10, "pt")) +
    xlim(0, 1) + ylim(0, 1)
}

# Create row plots with labels
row_16S <- plot_grid(col_16S_treatment, col_16S_yrtrt, col_16S_fire,
                     ncol = 3, labels = "A.", label_size = 14, hjust = -0.5, vjust = 2)
row_its <- plot_grid(col_its_treatment, col_its_yrtrt, col_its_fire,
                     ncol = 3, labels = "B.", label_size = 14, hjust = -0.5, vjust = 2)
row_rps10 <- plot_grid(col_rps10_treatment, col_rps10_yrtrt, col_rps10_fire,
                       ncol = 3, labels = "C.", label_size = 14, hjust = -0.5, vjust = 2)

# Combine all elements
facetted_figure <- plot_grid(
  row_16S,
  row_its,
  row_rps10,
  nrow = 3,
  align = 'v',
  axis = 'l',
  rel_heights = c(1.1, 1, 1)  # Slightly more height for the first row
)

facetted_figure

# Save the figure
ggsave("Figures/SOD/facetted_figure_with_ordination_PCoA.svg", facetted_figure, width = 16, height = 12)
ggsave("Figures/SOD/facetted_figure_with_ordination_PCoA.pdf", facetted_figure, width = 16, height = 12)

Let’s proceed with ordination for the ITS dataset-NMDS

set.seed(1)
strat_rel_sod_its.ps<-transform_sample_counts(sod_5asv_its.ps, function(x) x / sum(x))

ps_NMDS_its = ordinate(strat_rel_sod_its.ps, 
                   method="NMDS", 
                   distance="bray")
## Run 0 stress 0.2576872 
## Run 1 stress 0.2674122 
## Run 2 stress 0.2541107 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.04445565  max resid 0.2729956 
## Run 3 stress 0.2546313 
## Run 4 stress 0.2632918 
## Run 5 stress 0.2688285 
## Run 6 stress 0.2562481 
## Run 7 stress 0.2687562 
## Run 8 stress 0.2582637 
## Run 9 stress 0.2569978 
## Run 10 stress 0.25384 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.05346569  max resid 0.2685035 
## Run 11 stress 0.2540747 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.07882142  max resid 0.2544849 
## Run 12 stress 0.2622195 
## Run 13 stress 0.2545873 
## Run 14 stress 0.2522694 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.06291308  max resid 0.2700547 
## Run 15 stress 0.257715 
## Run 16 stress 0.2531111 
## Run 17 stress 0.2646711 
## Run 18 stress 0.2550554 
## Run 19 stress 0.2618915 
## Run 20 stress 0.2581042 
## *** Best solution was not repeated -- monoMDS stopping criteria:
##      4: no. of iterations >= maxit
##     16: stress ratio > sratmax
plot_its_trt<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_its.ps, 
                         ps_NMDS_its ,
                         color= "Treatuntreat_EP") +
  #ggtitle("NMDS ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "Treatuntreat_EP") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_its_trt<-plot_its_trt +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_its_trt

plot_its_fire<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_its.ps, 
                         ps_NMDS_its ,
                         color= "Fire_Mod") +
  #ggtitle("NMDS ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "Fire_Mod") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_its_fire<-plot_its_fire +
   stat_ellipse(linetype =2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_its_fire

plot_its_yrtrt<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_its.ps, 
                         ps_NMDS_its ,
                         color= "YrSinceTrt_BR") +
  #ggtitle("NMDS ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "YrSinceTrt_BR") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_its_yrtrt<-plot_its_yrtrt +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_its_yrtrt

Let’s proceed with ordination for the 16S dataset-NMDS

set.seed(1)
strat_rel_sod_16S.ps<-transform_sample_counts(sod_5asv_16S.ps, function(x) x / sum(x))


ps_NMDS_16S = ordinate(strat_rel_sod_16S.ps, 
                   method="NMDS", 
                   distance="bray")
## Run 0 stress 0.1604368 
## Run 1 stress 0.1716729 
## Run 2 stress 0.1612928 
## Run 3 stress 0.1607819 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.01560619  max resid 0.1123022 
## Run 4 stress 0.1610044 
## Run 5 stress 0.1604647 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.002323803  max resid 0.01999984 
## Run 6 stress 0.1610044 
## Run 7 stress 0.1622277 
## Run 8 stress 0.1607371 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.01719852  max resid 0.1120925 
## Run 9 stress 0.1612817 
## Run 10 stress 0.1615495 
## Run 11 stress 0.160948 
## Run 12 stress 0.1903654 
## Run 13 stress 0.1613659 
## Run 14 stress 0.1604646 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.002279417  max resid 0.01955903 
## Run 15 stress 0.1615656 
## Run 16 stress 0.1613245 
## Run 17 stress 0.1612624 
## Run 18 stress 0.1616372 
## Run 19 stress 0.1605033 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.005692339  max resid 0.05284277 
## Run 20 stress 0.1604807 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.002767785  max resid 0.02033782 
## *** Best solution was not repeated -- monoMDS stopping criteria:
##     20: stress ratio > sratmax
plot_16S_trt<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_16S.ps, 
                         ps_NMDS_16S ,
                         color= "Treatuntreat_EP") +
  #ggtitle("NMDS ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "Treatuntreat_EP") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_16S_trt<-plot_16S_trt +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_16S_trt

plot_16S_fire<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_16S.ps, 
                         ps_NMDS_16S ,
                         color= "Fire_Mod") +
  #ggtitle("NMDS ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "Fire_Mod") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_16S_fire<-plot_16S_fire +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_16S_fire

plot_16S_yrtrt<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_16S.ps, 
                         ps_NMDS_16S ,
                         color= "YrSinceTrt_BR") +
  #ggtitle("NMDS ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "YrSinceTrt_BR") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_16S_yrtrt<-plot_16S_yrtrt +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_16S_yrtrt

Let’s proceed with ordination for the RPS10 dataset-pCoA

set.seed(1)
strat_rel_sod_rps10.ps<-transform_sample_counts(sod_5asv_rps10.ps, function(x) x / sum(x))

ps_NMDS_rps10 = ordinate(strat_rel_sod_rps10.ps, 
                   method="NMDS", 
                   distance="bray")
## Run 0 stress 0.109065 
## Run 1 stress 0.1132285 
## Run 2 stress 0.112343 
## Run 3 stress 0.1122217 
## Run 4 stress 0.1086383 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.08973638  max resid 0.2663288 
## Run 5 stress 0.1090746 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.09218401  max resid 0.315221 
## Run 6 stress 0.1097841 
## Run 7 stress 0.1077114 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.05515573  max resid 0.2686255 
## Run 8 stress 0.1110021 
## Run 9 stress 0.1124331 
## Run 10 stress 0.1085894 
## Run 11 stress 0.1091704 
## Run 12 stress 0.1096264 
## Run 13 stress 0.110784 
## Run 14 stress 0.1135546 
## Run 15 stress 0.1105489 
## Run 16 stress 0.1087888 
## Run 17 stress 0.1091548 
## Run 18 stress 0.1151827 
## Run 19 stress 0.1087028 
## Run 20 stress 0.1099704 
## *** Best solution was not repeated -- monoMDS stopping criteria:
##     20: no. of iterations >= maxit
plot_rps10_trt<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_rps10.ps, 
                         ps_NMDS_rps10 ,
                         color= "Treatuntreat_EP") +
  #ggtitle("NMDS ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "Treatuntreat_EP") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_rps10_trt<-plot_rps10_trt +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_rps10_trt

plot_rps10_fire<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_rps10.ps, 
                         ps_NMDS_rps10 ,
                         color= "Fire_Mod") +
  #ggtitle("NMDS ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "Fire_Mod") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_rps10_fire<-plot_rps10_fire +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_rps10_fire

plot_rps10_yrtrt<- plot_ordination(strat_rel_sod_rps10.ps, 
                         ps_NMDS_rps10 ,
                         color= "YrSinceTrt_BR") +
  #ggtitle("NMDS ordination plot - relative abundance") +
  labs(color = "YrSinceTrt_BR") + 
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14), axis.title=element_text(size=14), title =  element_text(size=13), legend.text = element_text(size = 18))

plot_ellipses_rps10_yrtrt<-plot_rps10_yrtrt +
   stat_ellipse(linetype = 2) +
  theme_bw()

plot_ellipses_rps10_yrtrt

Let’s combine plots into facetted plot

### Let's combine plots into facetted plot
create_column <- function(ord_plot) {
  plot_grid(
    ord_plot,
    nrow = 1,
    align = 'v',
    axis = 'l',
    rel_heights = c(1)
  )
}

# Create columns for each dataset and factor
col_16S_treatment <- create_column(plot_ellipses_16S_trt)
col_16S_yrtrt <- create_column(plot_ellipses_16S_yrtrt)
col_16S_fire <- create_column(plot_ellipses_16S_fire)
col_its_treatment <- create_column(plot_ellipses_its_trt)
col_its_yrtrt <- create_column(plot_ellipses_its_yrtrt)
col_its_fire <- create_column(plot_ellipses_its_fire)
col_rps10_treatment <- create_column(plot_ellipses_rps10_trt)
col_rps10_yrtrt <- create_column(plot_ellipses_rps10_yrtrt)
col_rps10_fire <- create_column(plot_ellipses_rps10_fire)

# Function to create headers with horizontal lines above
create_header <- function(text) {
  ggplot() +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, color = "black", size = 0.5) +
    geom_text(aes(x = 0.02, y = 0.4, label = text), size = 5, fontface = "bold", hjust = 0) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(5, 0, 0, 10, "pt")) +
    xlim(0, 1) + ylim(0, 1)
}

# Create row plots with labels
row_16S <- plot_grid(col_16S_treatment, col_16S_yrtrt, col_16S_fire,
                     ncol = 3, labels = "A.", label_size = 14, hjust = -0.5, vjust = 2)
row_its <- plot_grid(col_its_treatment, col_its_yrtrt, col_its_fire,
                     ncol = 3, labels = "B.", label_size = 14, hjust = -0.5, vjust = 2)
row_rps10 <- plot_grid(col_rps10_treatment, col_rps10_yrtrt, col_rps10_fire,
                       ncol = 3, labels = "C.", label_size = 14, hjust = -0.5, vjust = 2)

# Combine all elements
facetted_figure <- plot_grid(
  row_16S,
  row_its,
  row_rps10,
  nrow = 3,
  align = 'v',
  axis = 'l',
  rel_heights = c(1.1, 1, 1)  # Slightly more height for the first row
)

facetted_figure

# Save the figure
ggsave("Figures/SOD/facetted_figure_with_ordination_NMDS.svg", facetted_figure, width = 16, height = 12)
ggsave("Figures/SOD/facetted_figure_with_ordination_NMDS.pdf", facetted_figure, width = 16, height = 12)
